dict.string: Copyright © 2026 Szymon Sypniewicz. All rights reserved.
Scribe records meeting audio for transcription. Audio stays on your Mac unless you've configured a cloud engine.
Scribe captures system audio so the other speakers in your call can be transcribed. No video is recorded.
Scribe reads the calendar event overlapping the current recording so the transcript can label speakers with attendee names. Calendar access is optional; recording works without it.
Scribe reads the calendar event overlapping the current recording so the transcript can label speakers with attendee names. Calendar access is optional; recording works without it.
